data.description: Harden lease lifecycle handling for work-knot execution so `claim` and `next` enforce explicit external lease states. A `claim` request that includes a `lease_id` must only proceed when that lease is in `lease_ready`; all other states, including `lease_active`, must be rejected before acceptance. On successful claim, the lease must transition to `lease_active` as part of the same operation. For `next`, if a knot has a bound lease, the caller must provide the matching `lease_id`; after a successful transition, the knot must clear its lease reference and the lease must be terminated. Lease-id validation may remain lightweight, but suspicious or corrupt lease-state should be emitted as warning/log signals and never silently ignored.
